name: free-cv-audit
description: Free CV Audit - static site and Netlify functions

scripts.test:pdf-quality: set -e; node tests/pdf-builder-formatting.test.js; node tests/generate-pdf-structured-parse-fallback.test.js; node tests/generate-pdf-render-fallback-canonicalization.test.js; node tests/generate-pdf-lenient-fallback.test.js; node tests/generate-pdf-model-fallback.test.js; node tests/generate-pdf-strict-style-mode.test.js; node tests/generate-pdf-strict-structured-required.test.js; node tests/generate-pdf-quality-floor-get.test.js; node tests/send-cv-email-quality-floor.test.js
scripts.test:all: set -e; for f in tests/*.test.js; do node "$f"; done
scripts.test:ci: npm run check:lock-sync && npm run test:all
